task_completion.description: Verify the Site Title has been updated to 'Wikimedia Foundation News'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Wikimedia Foundation News' in the 'Site Title' input field on the WordPress General Settings page, or visible in the WordPress Customizer/front-end header.

task_completion.description: Verify the Tagline has been updated to 'News and updates from the Wikimedia Foundation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'News and updates from the Wikimedia Foundation' in the 'Tagline' input field on the WordPress General Settings page or Customizer.

task_completion.description: Verify the Administration Email Address has been updated to 'press@wikimedia.org'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'press@wikimedia.org' in the 'Administration Email Address' input field on the WordPress General Settings page.

task_completion.description: Verify the Site Logo has been updated using the specified logo asset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Wikimedia logo image uploaded and set in the 'Logo' section of the WordPress Customizer (Appearance > Customize > Site Identity).

task_completion.description: Verify the Site Icon (favicon) has been updated using the specified icon asset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Wikimedia icon image uploaded and set in the 'Site Icon' section of the WordPress Customizer (Appearance > Customize > Site Identity).

task_completion.description: Verify a new page titled 'Press Resources' has been created, contains the logo image, and is published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the WordPress Page Editor showing the title 'Press Resources', the Wikimedia logo inserted into the page content block, and the page status indicating it is 'Published' (or a success message saying 'Page published').

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the WordPress Admin GUI in a web browser to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the WordPress dashboard (wp-admin), Customizer, and Page Editor, rather than terminal windows executing wp-cli commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent uploaded the actual image files from the local filesystem.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the WordPress Media Library upload interface or file picker dialog selecting files from '/home/ga/Brand_Assets/', rather than pasting external URLs.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually saved the settings rather than just modifying the DOM.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for 'Settings saved' confirmation notices in the WordPress dashboard or the 'Published'/'Update' button states reflecting actual backend changes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Site Title: 'Wikimedia Foundation News'. Expected Tagline: 'News and updates from the Wikimedia Foundation'. Expected Admin Email: 'press@wikimedia.org'. Expected Page Title: 'Press Resources'. Logo Asset Path: '/home/ga/Brand_Assets/wikimedia_logo.png'. Icon Asset Path: '/home/ga/Brand_Assets/wikimedia_icon.png'.
